steps.title: Read two points
steps.content:
From the graph, two clear points on the line are $(0,-5)$ and $(1,-3)$. The slope is
$$
\frac{-3-(-5)}{1-0}=2
$$
and the $y$-intercept is $-5$.

steps.title: Generate table values
steps.content: The line is $y=2x-5$. For the listed $x$-values, $$ y(0)=2(0)-5=-5 $$ $$ y(1)=2(1)-5=-3 $$ $$ y(2)=2(2)-5=-1 $$ The table with $(0,-5)$, $(1,-3)$, and $(2,-1)$ matches. The answer is D.
